name: Cyber Smash
description: Cyber Smash is a retro-inspired, neon-soaked Breakout game where quick reflexes and strategic power-up usage are key to victory. Smash through multi-layered cyber bricks using your glowing paddle and ball. Watch out for power-ups like Multi-ball and Fire Mode (Laser Guns) to unleash massive destruction and rack up huge combo scores. Complete all levels and become the ultimate Cyber Smasher! Features: Dynamic level generation, multiple power-up types, a challenging combo system, and persistent high scores.
instructions: bull Mouse Touch Drag the paddle horizontally bull Keyboard PC Left Arrow A to move left Right Arrow D to move right Launch Ball Fire Laser bull Mouse Touch Click or tap the screen bull Keyboard PC Spacebar Up Arrow W
